What We Do

Complete Plumbing & Excavation Services

One licensed team, two powerful capabilities. We handle everything from your bathroom tap to full civil earthworks.

Bathroom Renovations

Full bathroom fit-outs including tiling, vanities, showers, baths, and all plumbing connections. High-end finishes delivered on time.

Excavation & Civil Works

Site clearing, earthmoving, trenching, and preparation for builds. Modern machinery, done safely and efficiently.

Concrete Slabs & Footings

Supply and lay concrete slabs for sheds, garages, and residential foundations. Properly prepared and poured to Australian standards.

General Plumbing

Hot water systems, leak repairs, pipe replacement, drainage, stormwater, and all general plumbing needs for residential and commercial.

Drainage & Stormwater

Design and install drainage systems and stormwater management. Protecting your property from water damage year-round.

New Home Plumbing

Full rough-in and fit-off plumbing for new home builds. We work alongside builders to deliver complete installations on schedule.

Why Choose Us

Better Than the Rest — Here's Why

1

Licensed & Fully Insured

Current plumbing licence No. 120786. Every job backed by full public liability insurance — protecting you and your property.

2

One Team, Two Trades

Plumbing AND excavation under one roof means fewer delays, fewer contractors, and one clear point of accountability.

3

Clean, High-End Finishes

Our bathroom renovations are built to impress — premium materials, precision tiling, and attention to every detail.

4

Honest, Upfront Pricing

Free quotes with no obligation. We price fairly and communicate clearly — no surprise bills, no hidden fees.

5

Local Knowledge, Local Reliability

Born and based in regional Victoria, we understand the demands of rural and residential projects in our community.
